name: onion-architecture
summary: Enforces Onion Architecture (Ports & Adapters / Clean Architecture) for DevDigest backend modules. Use when adding a new feature module, refactoring a service, designing a repository, wiring a new adapter, or deciding where a piece of logic belongs. Trigger terms: onion, clean architecture, hexagonal, ports, adapters, dependency rule, domain layer, application layer, repository pattern, DI container, composition root.
